summary: Completed testing of BLOCK 159 (Dream List routing fix) and BLOCK 166 (Trade dispute resolution system). All tests passed. Fixed missing Clock icon import in AdminPage.js.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Missing 'Clock' icon import from lucide-react in AdminPage.js (line 12-13) - was causing runtime error when viewing Hold Disputes with active disputes
seed_data_creation: None required - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 166 trade dispute system fully tested. Admin panel has Hold Disputes tab. All 4 resolution buttons (Release Both Holds, Capture Offender & Refund Victim, Extend Investigation, Custom Split) are properly implemented. No active disputes in system - empty states shown correctly. Dream List items now link to /variant/{discogs_id} correctly (3 items with discogs_id, 3 without). How do trades work modal shows 4-step process with dispute information.

block_159_dream_list_routing.details: Dream List cards now link to /variant/{discogs_id} - tested 3 albums, all navigate correctly to variant pages

block_166_part1_how_trades_work.details: Button visible on Honeypot Trade tab, modal opens showing 4-step process (Agree & Value, Activate Mutual Hold, Secure Shipping, Instant Release) and dispute info

block_166_part2_dispute_backend.details: POST /api/trades/{id}/dispute exists, PUT /api/admin/hold-disputes/{id}/resolve accepts extend_investigation resolution

block_166_part2_admin_ui.details: Admin Panel shows Hold Disputes tab, Admin Disputes page at /admin/disputes renders correctly with Open/Resolved tabs

honeypot_tabs.details: All 3 tabs (Shop(2), Seeking(4), Trade(2)) work correctly

bug_fixed.issue: Missing Clock icon import in AdminPage.js
bug_fixed.impact: Would cause runtime error when rendering Hold Disputes section with active disputes
